FlowAccel Server — Installation Guide

Windows  |  Multi-Part Installer  |  Step-by-step walkthrough

4 Things You Must Know Before Starting
⚠️
Use the SECOND button — "Download FlowAccel Server Installer"
Do not click the first button. Look specifically for the second download button labelled FlowAccel Server Installer.
🖥️
Download MUST happen on the same device where FlowAccel will be deployed
Do not download on a different PC and transfer the files. The installer configures IIS, PostgreSQL, and Node specifically for the machine it runs on.
📦
Extract ONLY the .001 file — the .exe will appear automatically after extraction
Right-click FlowAccel-Setup-1.0.7z.001 → 7-Zip → Extract Here. 7-Zip combines all parts and produces FlowAccel-Setup-1.0.exe. Then right-click the .exe → Run as administrator.
✅
After installation — verify Node version, IIS node, and PostgreSQL are installed
Open Command Prompt and run node --version · psql --version · and check the IIS node module. All three must pass.
Step-by-Step Installation
1
Download the installer — on the deployment machine, second button

On the deployment machine, open the download page and click the second button — "Download FlowAccel Server Installer".

Download all parts — FlowAccel-Setup-1.0.7z.001 through .005 — plus SHA256SUMS.txt. Place them all in the same folder.

💡 Your browser may prompt "Allow multiple downloads" — click Allow to get all parts at once.
2
Install 7-Zip (if not already installed)

Open PowerShell or Command Prompt and run:

winget install 7zip.7zip
💡 If winget isn't available, download 7-Zip from 7-zip.org and install manually.
3
Extract ONLY the .001 file → the .exe will appear

Right-click FlowAccel-Setup-1.0.7z.001 → 7-Zip → Extract Here.

7-Zip automatically detects and combines all parts. Once done, FlowAccel-Setup-1.0.exe will appear in the same folder.

⚠️ Do NOT open or touch the .002–.005 files. Only ever extract from the .001 file.
4
Right-click the .exe → Run as administrator → follow the wizard

Right-click FlowAccel-Setup-1.0.exe → Run as administrator. The setup wizard presents these screens in order:

Screen 1 — Network Settings

Network settings — enter server IP / hostname and HTTP/HTTPS ports

Screen 2 — Microsoft Sign-In (Azure AD)

Microsoft Sign-In — enter Azure AD credentials below (or leave blank to skip)

Screen 3 — HTTPS Certificate

HTTPS certificate — select SelfSignedCA (recommended)

Screen 4 — PostgreSQL Passwords

PostgreSQL passwords — enter a 12-digit password (you can use Administrator)
💡 These passwords are used internally only — the database is never exposed to the network.

Screen 5 — Installation in Progress

Installation in progress — wait for it to complete fully before closing
5
After installation — verify Node, IIS node & PostgreSQL

Open a new Command Prompt or PowerShell and run all three checks. All must pass before proceeding.

  • 🟢
    Node.js version
    node --version → must show v18.x.x
  • 🟢
    IIS node module
    %windir%\system32\inetsrv\appcmd list module /name:iisnode → must list the iisnode module
  • 🟢
    PostgreSQL
    psql --version → must show psql (PostgreSQL) 15.x
💡 If psql is not found, add C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\15\bin to your system PATH and reopen the terminal.
🔑 Setup Credentials — Copy & Paste During Installation

Microsoft Sign-In Screen (Azure AD)

Client ID 9f65654a-59ef-4d90-a280-149a79ae9632

PostgreSQL Passwords Screen

Postgres Password Administrator
ℹ️ Enter Administrator as the 12-digit PostgreSQL superuser password.
🚀 After Installation — First Login to FlowAccel

Once installation completes, FlowAccel opens a login screen in your browser. Use these credentials to sign in for the first time.

Email / User ID Bk@bettroi.com
Password Administrator

Additional Documents
🔑 Azure AD — Information Required
FlowAccel Azure AD (Entra ID) OAuth
Information Required  |  Prepared for: Client / IT Administrator  |  Date: 18 May 2026
Action Required: Please provide the requested infrastructure environment details below and return this completed document.
To securely connect FlowAccel to your Microsoft 365 / Azure environment via Azure AD OAuth (Microsoft Entra ID), please compile the necessary integration strings into the tracking matrices below.
1. Azure AD / Entra ID Credentials Required
# Item Required Where to Find it in Azure Portal Your Value
1Application (Client) IDApp registration → Overview
Unique ID of the registered app
2Directory (Tenant) IDApp registration → Overview
Unique ID of your Azure directory
3Client Secret ValueCertificates & secrets → New client secret[Send Securely — See Alert Box]
4Expiry DateCertificates & secrets
5Redirect URI RegisteredAuthentication → Web platform
6Supported Account TypeSingle-tenant is recommended☐ Single Tenant    ☐ Other
💡 Register under Microsoft Entra ID → App registrations → New registration, name: Flowaccel. Redirect URI must use https://.
2. SSL/TLS Certificate Required
# Item Required Notes Your Value
7Domain Name (Common Name)Core corporate domain the certificate is issued for
8Issuing Certificate Authoritye.g., DigiCert, Sectigo, Let's Encrypt
9Valid From / Valid ToMust be currently valid (not expired)
10Auto-renewal Enabled?Confirms infra won't silently drop connection☐ Yes    ☐ No
🔒 Security: Client Secret and certificate private keys must NOT be sent via plain email. Use a password-manager share or encrypted package.
3. Server Software Requirement
#SoftwareNotesConfirmation
117-ZipDownload: 7-zip.orgInstalled: ☐ Yes   ☐ No
Version: ___________
4. Your Contact Details
Completed by (Name)
Role / Job Title
Email Address
Date Completed
Checklist Before Returning This Sheet
  • ☐  Items 1–6 (Azure AD credentials) completely filled out
  • ☐  Items 7–10 (SSL certificate details) entered and verified
  • ☐  Item 11 (7-Zip installation confirmed and version noted)
  • ☐  Client Secret prepared for distribution via secure/encrypted channel
  • ☐  Technical sign-off contact card fields finalized
